primary_complaint: Bilateral knee pain, right greater than left
functional_limitations: Cannot use stairs without hand rail
Pain limits ability to demonstrate drills as volunteer coach
objective_measurements: Right knee flexion limited to 95 degrees

imaging_findings.key_findings: X-ray (02/15/2025): Right knee: Severe tricompartmental osteoarthritis with bone-on-bone medial compartment involvement, Kellgren-Lawrence Grade IV, varus deformity 8 degrees. Left knee: Moderate OA, KL Grade III, less severe than right.

surgical_approach_if_mentioned: Anterior approach. Will perform standard primary TKA.

denial_risk_flags.label: Corticosteroid Injection Dates Undocumented
denial_risk_flags.explanation: The two cortisone injections are dated only as 'approx 2023, exact date unclear,' which does not meet payer documentation standards requiring specific dates for each injection to verify conservative care timeline.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Obtain and document exact dates for both corticosteroid injections from pharmacy records, injection logs, or prior visit notes to establish a verifiable conservative care timeline.

denial_risk_flags.label: Physical Therapy Duration at Minimum Threshold
denial_risk_flags.explanation: Physical therapy is documented at exactly 6 weeks, which meets some payer minimums but falls at the lower boundary; Aetna PPO may require documentation of specific session counts, functional goals, and a formal discharge summary to confirm adequate trial.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Obtain PT discharge summary from Lakeside Rehab documenting session frequency, functional goals attempted, and objective measures at discharge to substantiate failure of conservative care.
denial_risk_flags.anchorText: PT at Lakeside Rehab for 6 weeks

denial_risk_flags.label: Hyaluronic Acid Injection Duration Not Documented
denial_risk_flags.explanation: The Synvisc-One injection in 06/2024 has no documented follow-up interval or duration of observation before declaring minimal benefit, which payers may use to question whether adequate time was allowed to assess response.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Add a chart note specifying the follow-up date after the 06/2024 Synvisc-One injection and the duration over which minimal benefit was assessed.
denial_risk_flags.anchorText: Synvisc-One hyaluronic acid injection right knee 06/2024

denial_risk_flags.label: Elevated BMI May Require Additional Clearance
denial_risk_flags.explanation: BMI of 34.2 combined with ASA III comorbidities (HTN, T2DM, OSA) may trigger Aetna PPO's requirement for pre-operative medical optimization documentation or a weight management program attempt prior to elective TKA authorization.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Document that the patient has been counseled on BMI-related surgical risk and that medical optimization (A1c, blood pressure, CPAP compliance) has been reviewed and cleared by the appropriate specialist.

denial_risk_flags.label: No MRI Documented for Soft Tissue Assessment
denial_risk_flags.explanation: While X-ray findings are robust (KL Grade IV, bone-on-bone), some Aetna PPO policies for CPT 27447 may request MRI to rule out alternative diagnoses or confirm soft tissue integrity, particularly when bilateral disease is present.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Confirm with Aetna PPO whether MRI is required for CPT 27447 authorization; if so, order and complete MRI of the right knee prior to submission.

denial_risk_flags.label: Operating Surgeon Identity Placeholder Present
denial_risk_flags.explanation: The operating surgeon is listed as Dr. Sandra Reyes MD in the chart, which is a placeholder and does not match the requesting provider Dr. Sandra Reyes listed in the request details; payers require a clearly identified, credentialed operating surgeon on all prior authorization submissions.
denial_risk_flags.recommendation: Confirm and document the full name and NPI of the operating surgeon in the chart and ensure it matches the provider listed on the prior authorization request before submission.

diagnosis_codes.note: M17.11 (primary OA right knee) is a clinically appropriate and specific ICD-10 code that directly supports medical necessity for CPT 27447 right total knee arthroplasty.

conservative_treatment_duration.note: 1 of 2 duration-eligible treatments have an explicit numeric duration (50%). Meets the 50% threshold.

surgical_approach.note: The chart explicitly documents 'Anterior approach. Will perform standard primary TKA,' which is a specific, procedure-appropriate technique for CPT 27447.

cpt_code_valid.note: CPT 27447 is a recognized orthopedic surgical code.
